# Python dependencies for the Llama Stack test server.
# Prevent upgrading to versions that could break the test server.
# Versions may be updated when the Llama Stack test server is upgraded for compatibility.
milvus-lite==2.5.1
pymilvus==2.6.9
chardet==7.1.0
ollama==0.6.1
pypdf==6.9.0

# Override old dependencies from llama-stack 0.7.0 that fail to build on Python 3.12
# tiktoken 0.13.0 depends on regex 2019.12.9 which doesn't build on Python 3.12
# crc32c 2.0 (from oci package) doesn't build on Python 3.12
# Use newer versions that are compatible
tiktoken>=0.8.0
regex>=2024.0.0
crc32c>=2.7.0
